nodes.name: 📡 Load Existing Topics
nodes.notes: Reads all published topics so Agent 1 can avoid duplicates.

nodes.name: 📡 Fetch Reddit Trending
nodes.notes: Pulls real trending posts from Reddit. Change subreddits to match your niche.

value.system_message: ={{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.PERSONA || 'You are a helpful assistant. Return only valid JSON.' }}
value.user_message:
={{ $('📋 Parse Prompt Package').item.json.research_context }}

REAL TRENDING DATA FROM REDDIT (use this to select topics):
{{ $('💉 Inject Approved Topic').item.json.reddit_context }}

EXISTING PUBLISHED TOPICS (DO NOT REPEAT THESE):
{{ $('💉 Inject Approved Topic').item.json.existing_keywords }}

Select the SINGLE best topic to write about today. Return JSON:
{
  "topic": "exact article title",
  "primary_keyword": "main SEO keyword",
  "secondary_keywords": ["kw1", "kw2", "kw3"],
  "search_intent": "informational|transactional|navigational",
  "affiliate_angle": "which products could be recommended",
  "content_outline": ["H2 section 1", "H2 section 2", "...7-9 total"],
  "word_count_target": 3000,
  "is_halal_compliant": true,
  "not_duplicate": true
}

Return only valid JSON.

nodes.name: 🔍 Agent 1: Research & Topic
nodes.notes: Uses real Reddit trending data + existing topics to pick a unique topic.

value.system_message: ={{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.PERSONA || 'You are a helpful assistant.' }}

nodes.name: ✍️ Agent 2: Content Writer
nodes.notes: Writes full 2800+ word HTML article. Timeout set to 10 min for long generation.

value.system_message: ={{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.PERSONA || 'You are a helpful assistant.' }}
={{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.PERSONA || 'You are a helpful assistant. Return only valid JSON.' }}

nodes.name: 🎯 Agent 4: SEO & Monetization
nodes.notes: Adds affiliate disclosure, meta fields, and affiliate CTAs. Returns JSON.

value.system_message: ={{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.PERSONA || 'You are a helpful assistant. Return only valid JSON.' }}

nodes.name: 📋 Build QC Rejection Row
nodes.notes: Assembles rejection row from QC, Topic, Assemble, Config. agent_fallbacks_used from Parse Prompt Package, Topic, Parse & Validate QC.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to Rejected Posts Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends one row per QC rejection. Tab name from config REJECTED_POSTS_TAB.

nodes.name: 📋 Build Backlog Rejection Update
nodes.notes: When topic came from backlog (_row), outputs Row_Number + status for Sheets update; else skip_backlog_update.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Backlog Row (rejected)
nodes.notes: Updates Blog Idea Backlog row to status=rejected when topic had _row.

parameters.text: =QC rejected: {{ $json.topic }} — score {{ $json.qc_score }}/10, reasons: {{ $json.rejection_reasons }}. Fresh topic tomorrow.

nodes.name: 📱 Telegram: QC Rejected
nodes.notes: Sends QC rejection alert with topic, score, reasons.

parameters.jsonBody: ={   "prompt": "professional blog header image, {{ $('🖼️ Build Image Queries').item.json.primary_query }}, clean modern style, high quality, 1280x720",   "negative_prompt": "text, watermark, blurry, low quality",   "width": 1280, "height": 720,   "steps": 20, "cfg_scale": 7 }

nodes.name: 🎨 Generate Image (SD)
nodes.notes: Requires AUTOMATIC1111 Stable Diffusion running locally: ./webui.sh --api --listen

parameters.jsonBody: ={"source_url": "{{ $('🔀 Select Best Image').item.json.image_url }}", "alt_text": "{{ $('🔀 Select Best Image').item.json.image_alt }}", "title": "{{ $('✅ Parse & Validate Topic').item.json.slug || 'article-image' }}"}

nodes.name: 📤 Upload Image to WP Media
nodes.notes: Uploads image to WordPress Media Library. Returns media ID for featured image assignment.

nodes.name: 📝 Publish to WordPress
nodes.notes: Native WordPress node with retry. Post goes live immediately.

nodes.name: 🔗 Capture WP Post Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes WP node output to { id, link, status }. On error returns status publish_failed.

nodes.name: 🔀 Publish Succeeded?
nodes.notes: True: run satellites (indexing, Blotato, Calendar, Telegram). False: 01-05 wires publish_failed log + Telegram.

nodes.name: 📋 Assemble Content Log Row
nodes.notes: Single row per run: success and publish_failed both funnel here. Includes parse_error, parse_error_agents, status.

nodes.name: 🔍 Request Google Indexing
nodes.notes: Requires Google API credential with Indexing API scope enabled. Requests immediate crawl of new post.

value.user_message:
=You are a master prompt engineer for a content automation system. 
Today is {{ $now.format('dddd, MMMM D YYYY') }}. Niche: practical how-to guides.

Generate a JSON prompt package for today's content pipeline:
{
  "research_context": "Instructions for finding 3 trending how-to topics with high search intent and affiliate potential. Prioritize topics with: clear actionable steps, product recommendations possible, large audience.",
  "writer_instructions": "Instructions for writing a 2800+ word expert how-to article. Must include: compelling H1, intro with problem hook, 7-9 H2 sections with numbered steps, expert tips callouts, FAQ section (5 questions), conclusion with CTA. Tone: conversational expert.",
  "humanizer_instructions": "Instructions for rewriting to sound like a genuine expert blogger sharing personal experience. Add first-person observations, vary sentence rhythm, remove generic phrases, keep all factual content.",
  "seo_instructions": "Instructions for SEO optimization. Must produce: meta_title (under 60 chars), meta_description (under 155 chars), focus_keyword, tags array (8-10), affiliate disclosure at article top, 3 naturally integrated affiliate CTAs.",
  "qc_rubric": "Scoring rubric: word_count (min 2800, max 5000), readability (plain English), seo_compliance, affiliate_disclosure_present, factual_accuracy, reader_value. Score each 1-10. Approved if all scores >= 6 and avg >= 7.",
  "social_instructions": "Instructions for creating platform posts from the article. Facebook: engaging caption with emoji. Instagram: caption + CTA + 10 relevant hashtags. Pinterest: pin title + 200 char description + board name. YouTube Short script: 60 sec, hook/problem/solution/CTA. Save TikTok as script only."
}

Return only valid JSON, no markdown.

nodes.name: 🔀 Status is publish_failed?
nodes.notes: After Log: route to Telegram Publish Failed or Send Success Alert.
